title: Conference Talk
description: Structured extraction schema for conference talk information. A simple schema with 4 fields capturing the essential details of a conference presentation.

speaker_name.description: Full name of the speaker presenting the talk, including any titles or honorifics

topic.description: Title or subject matter of the conference talk

conference.description: Name of the conference or event where the talk was presented

location.description: City, venue, or geographic location where the conference took place
